utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. We compare each against the final package: (1) destination — fully specified (city, country, region). (2) travel_dates — clearly specified. (3) transportation — includes flight details (airline, airports, times, cost, baggage, class). (4) accommodation — includes hotel name, type, location, amenities, cost. (5) activities — includes multiple activities with names, types, and costs. (6) additional_services — includes several details such as guide, equipment, cancellation, and fees. (7) total_budget — includes total cost, currency, and remaining budget. All required items are present and fully detailed according to expectations. Dining is an additional category not required but does not affect completeness.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following items: destination Lisbon (Portugal), transportation by Budget Airline in Economy Class, accommodation at Cityscape Hotel, activities Hiking Expedition, Yoga Retreat, and Photography Experience (not in ground-truth, so excluded), and dining at Vegan Bistro. The ground-truth ratings show: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 7; Budget Airline Economy Class has a rating of 10; Cityscape Hotel has a rating of 6; Hiking Expedition has a rating of 10; Yoga Retreat has a rating of 10; Vegan Bistro has a rating of 10. Only listed items from the final package are mapped.
